ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hurricanes" (
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hurricane */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hurricane */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the hurricane occurred */,
  "sust_winds_mph" INTEGER /* Sustained wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "pressure_hpa" REAL /* Central pressure in hectopascals */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the hurricane */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the hurricane data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the hurricane */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the hurricane */,
  "landfall_locations" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of landfall locations */,
  "max_winds_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed recorded during the hurricane */,
  "max_pressure_hpa" REAL /* Lowest pressure recorded during the hurricane */,
  "total_damage" REAL /* Total economic damage caused by the hurricane */,
  "total_casualties" INTEGER /* Total number of people affected or killed by the hurricane */,
  "track_path" TEXT /* Detailed path of the hurricane's movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hurricanes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hurricanes_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Category 1, Category 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "wind_speed_range" TEXT /* Range of wind speeds for the category */,
  "pressure_range" TEXT /* Range of pressures for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., NOAA, National Hurricane Center) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Official website URL of the source */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Last date the source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the hurricane data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the hurricane data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane being corrected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the correction */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date when the correction was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the corrected data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the corrected data */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the correction */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the correction (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_corrections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane being assessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was made */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality of the data */,
  "quality_method" TEXT /* Method used to assess the quality */,
  "quality_reviewer" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_quality_reviewer FOREIGN KEY ("quality_reviewer") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane the data source belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the data */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "data_file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane the note belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was made */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of the note (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., annual summary, regional analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, graph, map) */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "visualization_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the visualization */,
  "visualization_size" REAL /* Size of the visualization file in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the comment belongs to */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES data_visualizations ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES data_reports ("report_id")
)
